creator: thomas@gibfest.dk
text:
node_exporter 0.18.0 spams messages every 15 seconds with the following error:

Jun 20 10:01:31 svaneke node_exporter[80549]: time="2019-06-20T10:01:31Z" level=error msg="ERROR: meminfo collector failed after 0.000104s: couldn't get memory: no such file or directory" source="collector.go:132"                                              
Jun 20 10:01:46 svaneke node_exporter[80549]: time="2019-06-20T10:01:46Z" level=error msg="ERROR: meminfo collector failed after 0.000128s: couldn't get memory: no such file or directory" source="collector.go:132"                                              
Jun 20 10:02:01 svaneke node_exporter[80549]: time="2019-06-20T10:02:01Z" level=error msg="ERROR: meminfo collector failed after 0.000098s: couldn't get memory: no such file or directory" source="collector.go:132"                                              
Jun 20 10:02:16 svaneke node_exporter[80549]: time="2019-06-20T10:02:16Z" level=error msg="ERROR: meminfo collector failed after 0.000109s: couldn't get memory: no such file or directory" source="collector.go:132"                                              
Jun 20 10:02:32 svaneke node_exporter[80549]: time="2019-06-20T10:02:32Z" level=error msg="ERROR: meminfo collector failed after 0.000078s: couldn't get memory: no such file or directory" source="collector.go:132"                                              
Jun 20 10:02:46 svaneke node_exporter[80549]: time="2019-06-20T10:02:46Z" level=error msg="ERROR: meminfo collector failed after 0.000108s: couldn't get memory: no such file or directory" source="collector.go:132"                                              
Jun 20 10:03:01 svaneke node_exporter[80549]: time="2019-06-20T10:03:01Z" level=error msg="ERROR: meminfo collector failed after 0.000118s: couldn't get memory: no such file or directory" source="collector.go:132"                                              
Jun 20 10:03:16 svaneke node_exporter[80549]: time="2019-06-20T10:03:16Z" level=error msg="ERROR: meminfo collector failed after 0.000079s: couldn't get memory: no such file or directory" source="collector.go:132"

Getting node_exporter upgraded to 0.18.1 fixes this. Hoping these log entries can make this easy to find from search engines for the future.
